asi.baseline: Tests and analyze pass. Main proxy penalties are 11 files over 300 lines and comment density; target cohesive extraction in large screens/services without changing behavior.

description: Split WhatsNew item presentation/model details into a focused part file and simplified icon resolution with a lookup map.

asi.learned: Moving dense item/icon/type concerns out of whats_new_model.dart made the catalog file small enough to drop below the large-file threshold while preserving the public API through a Dart part. A map-based icon resolver is shorter and easier to scan than a long switch.
asi.checks: flutter analyze and flutter test passed.
